name: Codex MCP Server
description: Installs codex-mcp-server and ripgrep, then auto-starts the MCP HTTP server in the workspace on container start.

version.description: Git ref (branch, tag, or commit) of codex-mcp-server to install.

SOURCE_HTTP_PROXY.description: Optional HTTP proxy used while downloading the codex-mcp-server source archive during feature installation.

MCP_HTTP_PORT.description: HTTP port used when the feature auto-starts codex-mcp-server with --transport http.
